error.cannot_open_serial_port: Failed to open the serial port

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of the Modbus gateway or device.
data_description.port: The TCP port the Modbus gateway listens on (default 502).

data_description.baudrate: The serial baud rate the device communicates at.
data_description.device: The serial port the Modbus device is connected to, e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0.

user.description: How is the Modbus network connected?

menu_options.serial: Serial (including serial proxies and networked connections)
